data.title: Topical and Oral Regimen for Skin Health
data.brief_summary: The overall objective of this study is to assess how oral supplementation with Inner Calm and the use of topical Super Calm can affect the appearance of skin and inner wellness, such as redness, skin sensitivity, and reactionary skin.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Women aged 18-55
* Fitzpatrick skin type 1-4
* Self-perception as sensitive skin

Exclusion Criteria:

Exclusion Criteria:

* Adults unable to consent
* Individuals who are not yet adults (infants, children, teenagers)
* Pregnant or breast-feeding women
* Prisoners
* Those who
endpoints: Changes in appearance of facial redness
Changes in appearance of facial pigmentation
